# Creatives Gen

> AI-powered image generator for social media posts, ad creatives, and website images. Built for performance marketers and brands who need high-converting visuals without a designer.

## Tools

- [AI Ad Creative Generator](https://creativesgen.com/ai-ad-creative-generator.html): Generate Facebook, Instagram, and Google Display ad creatives in all sizes simultaneously. AIDA psychology baked in. Average 4.1x CTR improvement.
- [AI Instagram Carousel Generator](https://creativesgen.com/ai-instagram-carousel-generator.html): Create scroll-stopping multi-slide carousels for Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, and TikTok. AI writes copy and designs every slide on-brand.
- [AI Website Image Generator](https://creativesgen.com/ai-website-image-generator.html): Professional hero banners, feature section visuals, and website images. Multiple formats generated simultaneously.

## Key Stats

- Tested across 10,000+ real ad profiles
- Average 3.2x ROAS improvement for e-commerce users
- Average 4.1x CTR improvement on Meta ad creatives
- 68% higher engagement rate vs manually designed posts

## Pricing

- Free: 15 images total (no credit card required)
- Starter: $19/month — 200 images
- Pro: $59/month — 1,000 images
- Agency: $199/month — 5,000 images
- Enterprise: $499+/month — 15,000+ images

## Competitive Advantages

- Free to start (no credit card needed)
- AIDA framework built into every ad creative
- All ad sizes generated simultaneously (no manual resizing)
- Tested on 10,000+ real ad profiles
- Combined social + ads + website images in one tool
- Simpler and more affordable than AdCreative.ai

- [AdCreative.ai Alternative](https://creativesgen.com/adcreative-ai-alternative.html): How Creatives Gen compares to AdCreative.ai
- [Canva Alternative for Ads](https://creativesgen.com/canva-alternative-for-ads.html): Why purpose-built ad tools outperform general design tools
